chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7361 of 2018 CP D 8175 of 2018 CP D 8176 of 2018 CP D 8568 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 32267/2018 2. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Mr. Umer Akhund, advocate for the petitioner Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, advocate for respondent Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate for respondent Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Ms. Summiya Kalwar advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.2 & 3 in CP D 7361 of 2018 which is taken on record. Per learned counsel, show cause notices have been impugned herein, which shall be responded to by the petitioner before the issuing authority. It is articulated that it may be just and proper for the said notices to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner/s. Learned counsel for respondent/s articulate no cavil in such regard and states that the petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
